allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force })
Bash(backend/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, mcp, google.genai, sqlalchemy, pyodbc; print\('backend venv OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, mcp, google.genai, sqlalchemy, pyodbc; print\('root venv OK'\)")
